title: Request for Planning Board Meeting Minutes – March 23, 2026

communications.subject: Massachusetts Public Records Law Request: Request for Planning Board Meeting Minutes – March 23, 2026
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Massachusetts Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting copies of the minutes for the Planning Board meeting held on March 23, 2026.

Please provide any minutes for this meeting, whether in draft or final form.

If no minutes exist, please confirm that fact in writing.

This request includes any records that document the discussions, deliberations, and actions taken at the March 23, 2026 Planning Board meeting.

For context, I note that the Planning Board subsequently met on April 6, April 27, May 4, and May 18, 2026. At the May 18, 2026 meeting, the Board approved the March 9, 2026 meeting minutes.

I also request that, if appropriate, fees be waived as we believe this request is in the public interest, as suggested but not stipulated by the recommendations of the Massachusetts Supervisor of Public Records. The requested documents will be made available to the general public free of charge as part of the public information service at MuckRock.com, and is not made for commercial usage.

I expect the request to be filled in an accessible format, including for screen readers, which provide text-to-speech for persons unable to read print. Files that are not accessible to screen readers include, for example, .pdf image files as well as physical documents.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Eileen Kelleher

communications.subject: PRR 2026-53 RE: Massachusetts Public Records Law Request: Request for Planning Board Meeting Minutes – March 23, 2026
communications.communication:
This office is in receipt of your request for public records information. We will be in contact with you if any changes are incurred when filling your request. Please be advised we have 10 business days to respond to your request or notify you that more time will be needed and any applicable fees.

Please feel free to contact us if you require any further assistance.

Thank you, Amy

Amy Berry
